title: Roasted Smoky Indian Chicken Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian dish featuring charred chicken and Italian seasoning, served with a side of basmati rice and made in a wok.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for 1 minute.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the italian seasoning, salt, and 1 cup of water, and stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the basmati rice to the wok and stir well to combine with the chicken and spice mixture.
Cover the wok with a lid and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
